title: The Art of War
author: Sun Tzu
description: An ancient Chinese military treatise. A timeless guide to strategy, leadership, and winning without fighting.

title: Meditations
author: Marcus Aurelius
description: Personal writings of the Roman emperor on Stoic philosophy. Reflections on virtue, duty, and the nature of life.

title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
description: A story of wealth, love, and the American Dream set in the Jazz Age. One of the greatest American novels.

title: Think and Grow Rich
author: Napoleon Hill
description: A classic personal development book exploring the principles of success, wealth, and achieving your goals.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A young shepherd's journey to find treasure teaches him about life, love, and following his dreams.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: An easy and proven way to build good habits and break bad ones. Small changes lead to remarkable results.
